features: Added guard proof upload preview confirmation with file names, sizes, and selected-file summary
Added proof upload validation for unsupported file types and oversized photos/videos before upload starts
Added uploading, success, and failed proof upload state feedback so guards are never left guessing
Disabled/blocked job completion while proof is still uploading
Added complete-without-proof confirmation modal when no proof is attached or the last upload failed
Completed jobs with proof route the guard to Completed and send proof to Dispatch Proof Review
Completed jobs without proof route to Completed and remain available in Report Builder for no-proof reports
Changed Proof Review behavior so stale Today filters are reset to All Dates when proof exists but is hidden
Proof Review table now uses uploaded_at before created_at so uploaded proof is not hidden by old request dates
Improved Proof Review empty state with explanation and Clear Filters action
Preserved v3.0.65 action locks and v3.0.66 cleanup behavior
